notes: Afghanistan-specific manual: Islamic Republic of Afghanistan, Ministry of Rural Rehabilitation and Development (MRRD), Low Volume Rural Roads Guideline and Standards, Volume 2 - Geometric Design and Road Safety, July 2020, ISBN 978-9936-8080-1-0. Produced under ReCAP/AsCAP project AFG2155A (Infra Africa, DFID-funded). Hosted on official research4cap.org. Covers geometric design and road safety for Tertiary and minor Secondary rural roads. Validated: valid PDF, 206 pages.
